title: dortmanna nana
intro: Dortmanna nana, also known as the Dwarf Mexican Mint or Mexican Mint Marigold, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Its leaves and flowers possess medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, due to their antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dortmanna nana include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and provide relief from colds and fever. The herbal preparations of Dortmanna nana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for a range of uses in herbal medicine, from calming digestive issues to soothing skin irritations.
